commit_message: Dev: fix crc module because of timing violation

examples.commit_message: Dev: fix crc module because of timing violation
examples.patch:
@@ -23,6 +23,18 @@ module ct_iu_crc (
     output   wire  [63:0]  crc_check_sum
 );
 
+
+//=================================================================
+// IMPL_HW_CRC_FEA: hardware crc instructions implementation
+// cause severe timing violation when FPGA run on 100MHz clock
+// frequency. so we dummy instantiate this module to avoid
+// vivado time warning if we don't need crc instruction in your
+// project. 
+// TODO: We will fix this in the future version. 
+//================================================================
+
+`ifdef IMPL_HW_CRC_FEA
+
 wire [63:0] data;
 wire [31:0] crcOut8;
 wire [31:0] crcOut16;
@@ -314,5 +326,13 @@ assign crc_res[63:0]  =   crc_type[1:0] == 2'b00 ? {{32{crcOut8[31]}},crcOut8[31
 
 assign crc_check_sum[63:0] =  crc_poly == 32'hEDB88320 ? crc_res : crcc_res;
 
+
+`else  // NOT IMPL_HW_CRC_FEA
+
+assign crc_check_sum[63:0] = crc_a[63:0];
+
+`endif
+
+
 endmodule
